    SELECT [s].[Id], [s].[AadharNumber], [s].[Address], [s].[AdminNotes], [s].[AlternateMobile], [s].[ApplicantName], [s].[ApprovalStatus], [s].[City], [s].[ConnectionType], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedBy], [s].[CurrentStage], [s].[Email], [s].[ExternalProductId], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[KVCapacity], [s].[LightBillNumber], [s].[LightBillOwnerType], [s].[LightBillPath], [s].[LightBillRelationName], [s].[LightBillRelationProofPath], [s].[MobileNumber], [s].[PANNumber], [s].[PinCode], [s].[PlanAmount], [s].[PmSuryaApplicationNo], [s].[PmSuryaLoanOption], [s].[RejectionReason], [s].[RequestNumber], [s].[RequestType], [s].[SelectedPlan], [s].[SolarProjectId], [s].[State], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[UpdatedBy], [s].[UserId]
    FROM [SolarRequests] AS [s]
    WHERE [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [s].[CreatedAt] DESC

) AS [t]

[d0].[Id], [d0].[ApprovalStatus], [d0].[ApprovedAt], [d0].[ApprovedBy], [d0].[CreatedAt], [d0].[CreatedBy], [d0].[DCRDate], [d0].[DCRNumber], [d0].[DocumentPath], [d0].[ExtractedData], [d0].[IsDeleted], [d0].[IsVerified], [d0].[RejectionReason], [d0].[Remark], [d0].[SolarRequestId], [d0].[UpdatedAt], [d0].[UpdatedBy], [t0].[CommissionAmount], [t0].[CommissionPercentage], [t0].[CreatedAt1], [t0].[CreatedBy0], [t0].[IsDeleted0], [t0].[IsPaid], [t0].[Notes], [t0].[PaidAt], [t0].[PaidBy], [t0].[PaymentReference], [t0].[ProjectAmount], [t0].[SolarRequestId], [t0].[UpdatedAt1], [t0].[UpdatedBy0], [t0].[UserId0], [t0].[WorkerId]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [s].[Id], [s].[AadharNumber], [s].[Address], [s].[AdminNotes], [s].[AlternateMobile], [s].[ApplicantName], [s].[ApprovalStatus], [s].[City], [s].[ConnectionType], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedBy], [s].[CurrentStage], [s].[Email], [s].[ExternalProductId], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[KVCapacity], [s].[LightBillNumber], [s].[LightBillOwnerType], [s].[LightBillPath], [s].[LightBillRelationName], [s].[LightBillRelationProofPath], [s].[MobileNumber], [s].[PANNumber], [s].[PinCode], [s].[PlanAmount], [s].[PmSuryaApplicationNo], [s].[PmSuryaLoanOption], [s].[RejectionReason], [s].[RequestNumber], [s].[RequestType], [s].[SelectedPlan], [s].[SolarProjectId], [s].[State], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[UpdatedBy], [s].[UserId], [u].[Id] AS [Id0], [u].[AadharNumber] AS [AadharNumber0], [u].[AccessFailedCount], [u].[Address] AS [Address0], [u].[City] AS [City0], [u].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u].[Email] AS [Email0], [u].[EmailConfirmed], [u].[FatherName], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[LockoutEnabled], [u].[LockoutEnd], [u].[MobileNumber] AS [MobileNumber0], [u].[NormalizedEmail], [u].[NormalizedUserName], [u].[PANNumber] AS [PANNumber0], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u].[PinCode] AS [PinCode0], [u].[SecurityStamp], [u].[State] AS [State0], [u].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0], [u].[UserName], [t].[Id] AS [Id1], [t].[CommissionAmount], [t].[CommissionPercentage], [t].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [t].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [t].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t].[IsPaid], [t].[Notes], [t].[PaidAt], [t].[PaidBy], [t].[PaymentReference], [t].[ProjectAmount], [t].[SolarRequestId], [t].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt1], [t].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy0], [t].[UserId] AS [UserId0], [t].[WorkerId]
    FROM [SolarRequests] AS [s]
    INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [s].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[CommissionAmount], [c].[CommissionPercentage], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[IsPaid], [c].[Notes], [c].[PaidAt], [c].[PaidBy], [c].[PaymentReference], [c].[ProjectAmount], [c].[SolarRequestId], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy], [c].[UserId], [c].[WorkerId]
        FROM [Commissions] AS [c]
        WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [s].[Id] = [t].[SolarRequestId]
    WHERE [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [s].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t0]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Amount], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsVerified], [p].[Notes], [p].[PaymentDate], [p].[PaymentMethod], [p].[ReceiptImagePath], [p].[ReceiptNumber], [p].[ReferenceNumber], [p].[SolarRequestId], [p].[Status], [p].[UTRNumber], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[UserId], [p].[VerifiedAt], [p].[VerifiedBy]
    FROM [Payments] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t1] ON [t0].[Id] = [t1].[SolarRequestId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[ContentType], [d].[CreatedAt], [d].[CreatedBy], [d].[DocumentType], [d].[FileName], [d].[FilePath], [d].[FileSizeBytes], [d].[IsDeleted], [d].[IsVerified], [d].[OCRExtractedData], [d].[OriginalFileName], [d].[SolarRequestId], [d].[UpdatedAt], [d].[UpdatedBy], [d].[UserId]
    FROM [Documents] AS [d]
    WHERE [d].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t2] ON [t0].[Id] = [t2].[SolarRequestId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [s0].[Id], [s0].[ApprovalStatus], [s0].[AssignedToId], [s0].[AssignedToUserId], [s0].[CompletedAt], [s0].[ConsumerNumber], [s0].[CreatedAt], [s0].[CreatedBy], [s0].[DiscomName], [s0].[EarthingAvailable], [s0].[GpsPhotoPath], [s0].[GridType], [s0].[InternetAvailable], [s0].[IsCompleted], [s0].[IsDeleted], [s0].[MeterType], [s0].[Obstructions], [s0].[OperationsRemark], [s0].[PropertyType], [s0].[RejectedAt], [s0].[RejectedBy], [s0].[RejectionReason], [s0].[RoofAvailable], [s0].[RoofDirection], [s0].[RoofDirectionOther], [s0].[RoofPhotoPath], [s0].[RoofTotalAreaSqft], [s0].[RoofType], [s0].[RoofTypeOther], [s0].[ShadowOnRoof], [s0].[SolarRequestId], [s0].[SurveyDate], [s0].[SurveyNotes], [s0].[SurveyPhotoPath], [s0].[UpdatedAt], [s0].[UpdatedBy], [s0].[WaterPumpType], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[AadharNumber], [u0].[AccessFailedCount], [u0].[Address], [u0].[City], [u0].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[EmailConfirmed], [u0].[FatherName], [u0].[FullName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LockoutEnabled], [u0].[LockoutEnd], [u0].[MobileNumber], [u0].[NormalizedEmail], [u0].[NormalizedUserName], [u0].[PANNumber], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u0].[PinCode], [u0].[SecurityStamp], [u0].[State], [u0].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0], [u0].[UserName]
    FROM [SiteSurveys] AS [s0]
    LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u0] ON [s0].[AssignedToId] = [u0].[Id]
) AS [t3] ON [t0].[Id] = [t3].[SolarRequestId]
LEFT JOIN [MeterDispatches] AS [m] ON [t0].[Id] = [m].[SolarRequestId]
LEFT JOIN [MaterialDispatches] AS [m0] ON [t0].[Id] = [m0].[SolarRequestId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [i].[Id], [i].[AssignedWorkerId], [i].[CompletedAt], [i].[CompletionPhotoPath], [i].[CreatedAt], [i].[CreatedBy], [i].[InstallationDate], [i].[IsCompleted], [i].[IsDeleted], [i].[Notes], [i].[Remark], [i].[SolarRequestId], [i].[UpdatedAt], [i].[UpdatedBy], [t5].[Id] AS [Id0], [t5].[AssignedByUserId], [t5].[AssignedDate], [t5].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [t5].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [t5].[InstallationId], [t5].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t5].[Notes] AS [Notes0], [t5].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0], [t5].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy0], [t5].[WorkerId], [t5].[Id0] AS [Id00], [t5].[City], [t5].[CreatedAt0] AS [CreatedAt00], [t5].[CreatedBy0] AS [CreatedBy00], [t5].[Email], [t5].[IsAvailable], [t5].[IsDeleted0] AS [IsDeleted00], [t5].[MobileNumber], [t5].[Name], [t5].[Specialization], [t5].[State], [t5].[Type], [t5].[UpdatedAt0] AS [UpdatedAt00], [t5].[UpdatedBy0] AS [UpdatedBy00]
    FROM [Installations] AS [i]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[AssignedByUserId], [w].[AssignedDate], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[InstallationId], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Notes], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy], [w].[WorkerId], [w0].[Id] AS [Id0], [w0].[City], [w0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [w0].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [w0].[Email], [w0].[IsAvailable], [w0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [w0].[MobileNumber], [w0].[Name], [w0].[Specialization], [w0].[State], [w0].[Type], [w0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0], [w0].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy0]
        FROM [WorkerAssignments] AS [w]
        INNER JOIN [Workers] AS [w0] ON [w].[WorkerId] = [w0].[Id]
        WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t5] ON [i].[Id] = [t5].[InstallationId]
) AS [t4] ON [t0].[Id] = [t4].[SolarRequestId]
LEFT JOIN [DCRDocuments] AS [d0] ON [t0].[Id] = [d0].[SolarRequestId]
ORDER BY [t0].[Id], [t0].[Id0], [t0].[Id1], [t1].[Id], [t2].[Id], [t3].[Id], [t3].[Id0], [m].[Id], [m0].[Id], [t4].[Id], [t4].[Id0], [t4].[Id00]

FROM (
    SELECT [s].[Id], [s].[AadharNumber], [s].[Address], [s].[AdminNotes], [s].[AlternateMobile], [s].[ApplicantName], [s].[ApprovalStatus], [s].[City], [s].[ConnectionType], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedBy], [s].[CurrentStage], [s].[Email], [s].[ExternalProductId], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[KVCapacity], [s].[LightBillNumber], [s].[LightBillOwnerType], [s].[LightBillPath], [s].[LightBillRelationName], [s].[LightBillRelationProofPath], [s].[MobileNumber], [s].[PANNumber], [s].[PinCode], [s].[PlanAmount], [s].[PmSuryaApplicationNo], [s].[PmSuryaLoanOption], [s].[RejectionReason], [s].[RequestNumber], [s].[RequestType], [s].[SelectedPlan], [s].[SolarProjectId], [s].[State], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[UpdatedBy], [s].[UserId]
    FROM [SolarRequests] AS [s]
    WHERE [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [s].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [t].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Amount], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsVerified], [p].[Notes], [p].[PaymentDate], [p].[PaymentMethod], [p].[ReceiptImagePath], [p].[ReceiptNumber], [p].[ReferenceNumber], [p].[SolarRequestId], [p].[Status], [p].[UTRNumber], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[UserId], [p].[VerifiedAt], [p].[VerifiedBy]
    FROM [Payments] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[SolarRequestId]
ORDER BY [t].[CreatedAt] DESC, [t].[Id], [u].[Id]

        SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[CommissionAmount], [c].[CommissionPercentage], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[IsPaid], [c].[Notes], [c].[PaidAt], [c].[PaidBy], [c].[PaymentReference], [c].[ProjectAmount], [c].[SolarRequestId], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy], [c].[UserId], [c].[WorkerId]

    FROM [SiteSurveys] AS [s0]

    SELECT TOP(1) [s].[Id], [s].[AadharNumber], [s].[Address], [s].[AdminNotes], [s].[AlternateMobile], [s].[ApplicantName], [s].[ApprovalStatus], [s].[City], [s].[ConnectionType], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedBy], [s].[CurrentStage], [s].[Email], [s].[ExternalProductId], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[KVCapacity], [s].[LightBillNumber], [s].[LightBillOwnerType], [s].[LightBillPath], [s].[LightBillRelationName], [s].[LightBillRelationProofPath], [s].[MobileNumber], [s].[PANNumber], [s].[PinCode], [s].[PlanAmount], [s].[PmSuryaApplicationNo], [s].[PmSuryaLoanOption], [s].[RejectionReason], [s].[RequestNumber], [s].[RequestType], [s].[SelectedPlan], [s].[SolarProjectId], [s].[State], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[UpdatedBy], [s].[UserId], [u].[Id] AS [Id0], [u].[AadharNumber] AS [AadharNumber0], [u].[AccessFailedCount], [u].[Address] AS [Address0], [u].[City] AS [City0], [u].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u].[Email] AS [Email0], [u].[EmailConfirmed], [u].[FatherName], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[LockoutEnabled], [u].[LockoutEnd], [u].[MobileNumber] AS [MobileNumber0], [u].[NormalizedEmail], [u].[NormalizedUserName], [u].[PANNumber] AS [PANNumber0], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u].[PinCode] AS [PinCode0], [u].[SecurityStamp], [u].[State] AS [State0], [u].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0], [u].[UserName], [t].[Id] AS [Id1], [t].[CommissionAmount], [t].[CommissionPercentage], [t].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [t].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [t].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t].[IsPaid], [t].[Notes], [t].[PaidAt], [t].[PaidBy], [t].[PaymentReference], [t].[ProjectAmount], [t].[SolarRequestId], [t].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt1], [t].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy0], [t].[UserId] AS [UserId0], [t].[WorkerId]
    FROM [SolarRequests] AS [s]
    INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [s].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[CommissionAmount], [c].[CommissionPercentage], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[IsPaid], [c].[Notes], [c].[PaidAt], [c].[PaidBy], [c].[PaymentReference], [c].[ProjectAmount], [c].[SolarRequestId], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy], [c].[UserId], [c].[WorkerId]
        FROM [Commissions] AS [c]
        WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [s].[Id] = [t].[SolarRequestId]
    WHERE [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [s].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t0]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Amount], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsVerified], [p].[Notes], [p].[PaymentDate], [p].[PaymentMethod], [p].[ReceiptImagePath], [p].[ReceiptNumber], [p].[ReferenceNumber], [p].[SolarRequestId], [p].[Status], [p].[UTRNumber], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[UserId], [p].[VerifiedAt], [p].[VerifiedBy]
    FROM [Payments] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t1] ON [t0].[Id] = [t1].[SolarRequestId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[ContentType], [d].[CreatedAt], [d].[CreatedBy], [d].[DocumentType], [d].[FileName], [d].[FilePath], [d].[FileSizeBytes], [d].[IsDeleted], [d].[IsVerified], [d].[OCRExtractedData], [d].[OriginalFileName], [d].[SolarRequestId], [d].[UpdatedAt], [d].[UpdatedBy], [d].[UserId]
    FROM [Documents] AS [d]
    WHERE [d].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t2] ON [t0].[Id] = [t2].[SolarRequestId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [s0].[Id], [s0].[ApprovalStatus], [s0].[AssignedToId], [s0].[AssignedToUserId], [s0].[CompletedAt], [s0].[ConsumerNumber], [s0].[CreatedAt], [s0].[CreatedBy], [s0].[DiscomName], [s0].[EarthingAvailable], [s0].[GpsPhotoPath], [s0].[GridType], [s0].[InternetAvailable], [s0].[IsCompleted], [s0].[IsDeleted], [s0].[MeterType], [s0].[Obstructions], [s0].[OperationsRemark], [s0].[PropertyType], [s0].[RejectedAt], [s0].[RejectedBy], [s0].[RejectionReason], [s0].[RoofAvailable], [s0].[RoofDirection], [s0].[RoofDirectionOther], [s0].[RoofPhotoPath], [s0].[RoofTotalAreaSqft], [s0].[RoofType], [s0].[RoofTypeOther], [s0].[ShadowOnRoof], [s0].[SolarRequestId], [s0].[SurveyDate], [s0].[SurveyNotes], [s0].[SurveyPhotoPath], [s0].[UpdatedAt], [s0].[UpdatedBy], [s0].[WaterPumpType], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[AadharNumber], [u0].[AccessFailedCount], [u0].[Address], [u0].[City], [u0].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[EmailConfirmed], [u0].[FatherName], [u0].[FullName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LockoutEnabled], [u0].[LockoutEnd], [u0].[MobileNumber], [u0].[NormalizedEmail], [u0].[NormalizedUserName], [u0].[PANNumber], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u0].[PinCode], [u0].[SecurityStamp], [u0].[State], [u0].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0], [u0].[UserName]
    FROM [SiteSurveys] AS [s0]
    LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u0] ON [s0].[AssignedToId] = [u0].[Id]
) AS [t3] ON [t0].[Id] = [t3].[SolarRequestId]
LEFT JOIN [MeterDispatches] AS [m] ON [t0].[Id] = [m].[SolarRequestId]
LEFT JOIN [MaterialDispatches] AS [m0] ON [t0].[Id] = [m0].[SolarRequestId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [i].[Id], [i].[AssignedWorkerId], [i].[CompletedAt], [i].[CompletionPhotoPath], [i].[CreatedAt], [i].[CreatedBy], [i].[InstallationDate], [i].[IsCompleted], [i].[IsDeleted], [i].[Notes], [i].[Remark], [i].[SolarRequestId], [i].[UpdatedAt], [i].[UpdatedBy], [t5].[Id] AS [Id0], [t5].[AssignedByUserId], [t5].[AssignedDate], [t5].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [t5].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [t5].[InstallationId], [t5].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t5].[Notes] AS [Notes0], [t5].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0], [t5].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy0], [t5].[WorkerId], [t5].[Id0] AS [Id00], [t5].[City], [t5].[CreatedAt0] AS [CreatedAt00], [t5].[CreatedBy0] AS [CreatedBy00], [t5].[Email], [t5].[IsAvailable], [t5].[IsDeleted0] AS [IsDeleted00], [t5].[MobileNumber], [t5].[Name], [t5].[Specialization], [t5].[State], [t5].[Type], [t5].[UpdatedAt0] AS [UpdatedAt00], [t5].[UpdatedBy0] AS [UpdatedBy00]
    FROM [Installations] AS [i]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[AssignedByUserId], [w].[AssignedDate], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[InstallationId], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Notes], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy], [w].[WorkerId], [w0].[Id] AS [Id0], [w0].[City], [w0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [w0].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [w0].[Email], [w0].[IsAvailable], [w0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [w0].[MobileNumber], [w0].[Name], [w0].[Specialization], [w0].[State], [w0].[Type], [w0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0], [w0].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy0]
        FROM [WorkerAssignments] AS [w]
        INNER JOIN [Workers] AS [w0] ON [w].[WorkerId] = [w0].[Id]
        WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t5] ON [i].[Id] = [t5].[InstallationId]
) AS [t4] ON [t0].[Id] = [t4].[SolarRequestId]
LEFT JOIN [DCRDocuments] AS [d0] ON [t0].[Id] = [d0].[SolarRequestId]
ORDER BY [t0].[Id], [t0].[Id0], [t0].[Id1], [t1].[Id], [t2].[Id], [t3].[Id], [t3].[Id0], [m].[Id], [m0].[Id], [t4].[Id], [t4].[Id0], [t4].[Id00]

[t0].[UpdatedAt1], [t0].[UpdatedBy0], [t0].[UserId0], [t0].[WorkerId]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [s].[Id], [s].[AadharNumber], [s].[Address], [s].[AdminNotes], [s].[AlternateMobile], [s].[ApplicantName], [s].[ApprovalStatus], [s].[City], [s].[ConnectionType], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedBy], [s].[CurrentStage], [s].[Email], [s].[ExternalProductId], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[KVCapacity], [s].[LightBillNumber], [s].[LightBillOwnerType], [s].[LightBillPath], [s].[LightBillRelationName], [s].[LightBillRelationProofPath], [s].[MobileNumber], [s].[PANNumber], [s].[PinCode], [s].[PlanAmount], [s].[PmSuryaApplicationNo], [s].[PmSuryaLoanOption], [s].[RejectionReason], [s].[RequestNumber], [s].[RequestType], [s].[SelectedPlan], [s].[SolarProjectId], [s].[State], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[UpdatedBy], [s].[UserId], [u].[Id] AS [Id0], [u].[AadharNumber] AS [AadharNumber0], [u].[AccessFailedCount], [u].[Address] AS [Address0], [u].[City] AS [City0], [u].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u].[Email] AS [Email0], [u].[EmailConfirmed], [u].[FatherName], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[LockoutEnabled], [u].[LockoutEnd], [u].[MobileNumber] AS [MobileNumber0], [u].[NormalizedEmail], [u].[NormalizedUserName], [u].[PANNumber] AS [PANNumber0], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u].[PinCode] AS [PinCode0], [u].[SecurityStamp], [u].[State] AS [State0], [u].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0], [u].[UserName], [t].[Id] AS [Id1], [t].[CommissionAmount], [t].[CommissionPercentage], [t].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [t].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [t].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t].[IsPaid], [t].[Notes], [t].[PaidAt], [t].[PaidBy], [t].[PaymentReference], [t].[ProjectAmount], [t].[SolarRequestId], [t].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt1], [t].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy0], [t].[UserId] AS [UserId0], [t].[WorkerId]
    FROM [SolarRequests] AS [s]
    INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [s].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[CommissionAmount], [c].[CommissionPercentage], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[IsPaid], [c].[Notes], [c].[PaidAt], [c].[PaidBy], [c].[PaymentReference], [c].[ProjectAmount], [c].[SolarRequestId], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy], [c].[UserId], [c].[WorkerId]
        FROM [Commissions] AS [c]
        WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [s].[Id] = [t].[SolarRequestId]
    WHERE [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [s].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t0]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Amount], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsVerified], [p].[Notes], [p].[PaymentDate], [p].[PaymentMethod], [p].[ReceiptImagePath], [p].[ReceiptNumber], [p].[ReferenceNumber], [p].[SolarRequestId], [p].[Status], [p].[UTRNumber], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[UserId], [p].[VerifiedAt], [p].[VerifiedBy]
    FROM [Payments] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t1] ON [t0].[Id] = [t1].[SolarRequestId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[ContentType], [d].[CreatedAt], [d].[CreatedBy], [d].[DocumentType], [d].[FileName], [d].[FilePath], [d].[FileSizeBytes], [d].[IsDeleted], [d].[IsVerified], [d].[OCRExtractedData], [d].[OriginalFileName], [d].[SolarRequestId], [d].[UpdatedAt], [d].[UpdatedBy], [d].[UserId]
    FROM [Documents] AS [d]
    WHERE [d].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t2] ON [t0].[Id] = [t2].[SolarRequestId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [s0].[Id], [s0].[ApprovalStatus], [s0].[AssignedToId], [s0].[AssignedToUserId], [s0].[CompletedAt], [s0].[ConsumerNumber], [s0].[CreatedAt], [s0].[CreatedBy], [s0].[DiscomName], [s0].[EarthingAvailable], [s0].[GpsPhotoPath], [s0].[GridType], [s0].[InternetAvailable], [s0].[IsCompleted], [s0].[IsDeleted], [s0].[MeterType], [s0].[Obstructions], [s0].[OperationsRemark], [s0].[PropertyType], [s0].[RejectedAt], [s0].[RejectedBy], [s0].[RejectionReason], [s0].[RoofAvailable], [s0].[RoofDirection], [s0].[RoofDirectionOther], [s0].[RoofPhotoPath], [s0].[RoofTotalAreaSqft], [s0].[RoofType], [s0].[RoofTypeOther], [s0].[ShadowOnRoof], [s0].[SolarRequestId], [s0].[SurveyDate], [s0].[SurveyNotes], [s0].[SurveyPhotoPath], [s0].[UpdatedAt], [s0].[UpdatedBy], [s0].[WaterPumpType], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[AadharNumber], [u0].[AccessFailedCount], [u0].[Address], [u0].[City], [u0].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[EmailConfirmed], [u0].[FatherName], [u0].[FullName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LockoutEnabled], [u0].[LockoutEnd], [u0].[MobileNumber], [u0].[NormalizedEmail], [u0].[NormalizedUserName], [u0].[PANNumber], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u0].[PinCode], [u0].[SecurityStamp], [u0].[State], [u0].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0], [u0].[UserName]
    FROM [SiteSurveys] AS [s0]
    LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u0] ON [s0].[AssignedToId] = [u0].[Id]
) AS [t3] ON [t0].[Id] = [t3].[SolarRequestId]
LEFT JOIN [MeterDispatches] AS [m] ON [t0].[Id] = [m].[SolarRequestId]
LEFT JOIN [MaterialDispatches] AS [m0] ON [t0].[Id] = [m0].[SolarRequestId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [i].[Id], [i].[AssignedWorkerId], [i].[CompletedAt], [i].[CompletionPhotoPath], [i].[CreatedAt], [i].[CreatedBy], [i].[InstallationDate], [i].[IsCompleted], [i].[IsDeleted], [i].[Notes], [i].[Remark], [i].[SolarRequestId], [i].[UpdatedAt], [i].[UpdatedBy], [t5].[Id] AS [Id0], [t5].[AssignedByUserId], [t5].[AssignedDate], [t5].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [t5].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [t5].[InstallationId], [t5].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t5].[Notes] AS [Notes0], [t5].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0], [t5].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy0], [t5].[WorkerId], [t5].[Id0] AS [Id00], [t5].[City], [t5].[CreatedAt0] AS [CreatedAt00], [t5].[CreatedBy0] AS [CreatedBy00], [t5].[Email], [t5].[IsAvailable], [t5].[IsDeleted0] AS [IsDeleted00], [t5].[MobileNumber], [t5].[Name], [t5].[Specialization], [t5].[State], [t5].[Type], [t5].[UpdatedAt0] AS [UpdatedAt00], [t5].[UpdatedBy0] AS [UpdatedBy00]
    FROM [Installations] AS [i]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[AssignedByUserId], [w].[AssignedDate], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[InstallationId], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Notes], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy], [w].[WorkerId], [w0].[Id] AS [Id0], [w0].[City], [w0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [w0].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [w0].[Email], [w0].[IsAvailable], [w0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [w0].[MobileNumber], [w0].[Name], [w0].[Specialization], [w0].[State], [w0].[Type], [w0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0], [w0].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy0]
        FROM [WorkerAssignments] AS [w]
        INNER JOIN [Workers] AS [w0] ON [w].[WorkerId] = [w0].[Id]
        WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t5] ON [i].[Id] = [t5].[InstallationId]
) AS [t4] ON [t0].[Id] = [t4].[SolarRequestId]
LEFT JOIN [DCRDocuments] AS [d0] ON [t0].[Id] = [d0].[SolarRequestId]
ORDER BY [t0].[Id], [t0].[Id0], [t0].[Id1], [t1].[Id], [t2].[Id], [t3].[Id], [t3].[Id0], [m].[Id], [m0].[Id], [t4].[Id], [t4].[Id0], [t4].[Id00]

FROM (
    SELECT [s].[Id], [s].[AadharNumber], [s].[Address], [s].[AdminNotes], [s].[AlternateMobile], [s].[ApplicantName], [s].[ApprovalStatus], [s].[City], [s].[ConnectionType], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedBy], [s].[CurrentStage], [s].[Email], [s].[ExternalProductId], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[KVCapacity], [s].[LightBillNumber], [s].[LightBillOwnerType], [s].[LightBillPath], [s].[LightBillRelationName], [s].[LightBillRelationProofPath], [s].[MobileNumber], [s].[PANNumber], [s].[PinCode], [s].[PlanAmount], [s].[PmSuryaApplicationNo], [s].[PmSuryaLoanOption], [s].[RejectionReason], [s].[RequestNumber], [s].[RequestType], [s].[SelectedPlan], [s].[SolarProjectId], [s].[State], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[UpdatedBy], [s].[UserId]
    FROM [SolarRequests] AS [s]
    WHERE [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [s].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [t].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Amount], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsVerified], [p].[Notes], [p].[PaymentDate], [p].[PaymentMethod], [p].[ReceiptImagePath], [p].[ReceiptNumber], [p].[ReferenceNumber], [p].[SolarRequestId], [p].[Status], [p].[UTRNumber], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[UserId], [p].[VerifiedAt], [p].[VerifiedBy]
    FROM [Payments] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[SolarRequestId]
ORDER BY [t].[CreatedAt] DESC, [t].[Id], [u].[Id]

    FROM [SolarRequests] AS [s]
    INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [s].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[CommissionAmount], [c].[CommissionPercentage], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[IsPaid], [c].[Notes], [c].[PaidAt], [c].[PaidBy], [c].[PaymentReference], [c].[ProjectAmount], [c].[SolarRequestId], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy], [c].[UserId], [c].[WorkerId]

    ) AS [t] ON [s].[Id] = [t].[SolarRequestId]

SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[AadharNumber], [t].[Address], [t].[AdminNotes], [t].[AlternateMobile], [t].[ApplicantName], [t].[ApprovalStatus], [t].[City], [t].[ConnectionType], [t].[CreatedAt], [t].[CreatedBy], [t].[CurrentStage], [t].[Email], [t].[ExternalProductId], [t].[IsDeleted], [t].[KVCapacity], [t].[LightBillNumber], [t].[LightBillOwnerType], [t].[LightBillPath], [t].[LightBillRelationName], [t].[LightBillRelationProofPath], [t].[MobileNumber], [t].[PANNumber], [t].[PinCode], [t].[PlanAmount], [t].[PmSuryaApplicationNo], [t].[PmSuryaLoanOption], [t].[RejectionReason], [t].[RequestNumber], [t].[RequestType], [t].[SelectedPlan], [t].[SolarProjectId], [t].[State], [t].[UpdatedAt], [t].[UpdatedBy], [t].[UserId], [u].[Id], [u].[AadharNumber], [u].[AccessFailedCount], [u].[Address], [u].[City], [u].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[EmailConfirmed], [u].[FatherName], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[LockoutEnabled], [u].[LockoutEnd], [u].[MobileNumber], [u].[NormalizedEmail], [u].[NormalizedUserName], [u].[PANNumber], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u].[PinCode], [u].[SecurityStamp], [u].[State], [u].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UserName], [t0].[Id], [t0].[Amount], [t0].[CreatedAt], [t0].[CreatedBy], [t0].[IsDeleted], [t0].[IsVerified], [t0].[Notes], [t0].[PaymentDate], [t0].[PaymentMethod], [t0].[ReceiptImagePath], [t0].[ReceiptNumber], [t0].[ReferenceNumber], [t0].[SolarRequestId], [t0].[Status], [t0].[UTRNumber], [t0].[UpdatedAt], [t0].[UpdatedBy], [t0].[UserId], [t0].[VerifiedAt], [t0].[VerifiedBy]
FROM (
    SELECT [s].[Id], [s].[AadharNumber], [s].[Address], [s].[AdminNotes], [s].[AlternateMobile], [s].[ApplicantName], [s].[ApprovalStatus], [s].[City], [s].[ConnectionType], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedBy], [s].[CurrentStage], [s].[Email], [s].[ExternalProductId], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[KVCapacity], [s].[LightBillNumber], [s].[LightBillOwnerType], [s].[LightBillPath], [s].[LightBillRelationName], [s].[LightBillRelationProofPath], [s].[MobileNumber], [s].[PANNumber], [s].[PinCode], [s].[PlanAmount], [s].[PmSuryaApplicationNo], [s].[PmSuryaLoanOption], [s].[RejectionReason], [s].[RequestNumber], [s].[RequestType], [s].[SelectedPlan], [s].[SolarProjectId], [s].[State], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[UpdatedBy], [s].[UserId]
    FROM [SolarRequests] AS [s]
    WHERE [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [s].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [t].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Amount], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsVerified], [p].[Notes], [p].[PaymentDate], [p].[PaymentMethod], [p].[ReceiptImagePath], [p].[ReceiptNumber], [p].[ReferenceNumber], [p].[SolarRequestId], [p].[Status], [p].[UTRNumber], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[UserId], [p].[VerifiedAt], [p].[VerifiedBy]
    FROM [Payments] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[SolarRequestId]
ORDER BY [t].[CreatedAt] DESC, [t].[Id], [u].[Id]

    WHERE [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)

) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[SolarRequestId]

    SELECT [s].[Id], [s].[AadharNumber], [s].[Address], [s].[AdminNotes], [s].[AlternateMobile], [s].[ApplicantName], [s].[ApprovalStatus], [s].[City], [s].[ConnectionType], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedBy], [s].[CurrentStage], [s].[Email], [s].[ExternalProductId], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[KVCapacity], [s].[LightBillNumber], [s].[LightBillOwnerType], [s].[LightBillPath], [s].[LightBillRelationName], [s].[LightBillRelationProofPath], [s].[MobileNumber], [s].[PANNumber], [s].[PinCode], [s].[PlanAmount], [s].[PmSuryaApplicationNo], [s].[PmSuryaLoanOption], [s].[RejectionReason], [s].[RequestNumber], [s].[RequestType], [s].[SelectedPlan], [s].[SolarProjectId], [s].[State], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[UpdatedBy], [s].[UserId]
    FROM [SolarRequests] AS [s]
    WHERE [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [s].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [t].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Amount], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsVerified], [p].[Notes], [p].[PaymentDate], [p].[PaymentMethod], [p].[ReceiptImagePath], [p].[ReceiptNumber], [p].[ReferenceNumber], [p].[SolarRequestId], [p].[Status], [p].[UTRNumber], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[UserId], [p].[VerifiedAt], [p].[VerifiedBy]
    FROM [Payments] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[SolarRequestId]
ORDER BY [t].[CreatedAt] DESC, [t].[Id], [u].[Id]

    WHERE [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)

) AS [t]

    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Amount], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsVerified], [p].[Notes], [p].[PaymentDate], [p].[PaymentMethod], [p].[ReceiptImagePath], [p].[ReceiptNumber], [p].[ReferenceNumber], [p].[SolarRequestId], [p].[Status], [p].[UTRNumber], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[UserId], [p].[VerifiedAt], [p].[VerifiedBy]

FROM (
    SELECT [s].[Id], [s].[AadharNumber], [s].[Address], [s].[AdminNotes], [s].[AlternateMobile], [s].[ApplicantName], [s].[ApprovalStatus], [s].[City], [s].[ConnectionType], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedBy], [s].[CurrentStage], [s].[Email], [s].[ExternalProductId], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[KVCapacity], [s].[LightBillNumber], [s].[LightBillOwnerType], [s].[LightBillPath], [s].[LightBillRelationName], [s].[LightBillRelationProofPath], [s].[MobileNumber], [s].[PANNumber], [s].[PinCode], [s].[PlanAmount], [s].[PmSuryaApplicationNo], [s].[PmSuryaLoanOption], [s].[RejectionReason], [s].[RequestNumber], [s].[RequestType], [s].[SelectedPlan], [s].[SolarProjectId], [s].[State], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[UpdatedBy], [s].[UserId]
    FROM [SolarRequests] AS [s]
    WHERE [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [s].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [t].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Amount], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsVerified], [p].[Notes], [p].[PaymentDate], [p].[PaymentMethod], [p].[ReceiptImagePath], [p].[ReceiptNumber], [p].[ReferenceNumber], [p].[SolarRequestId], [p].[Status], [p].[UTRNumber], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[UserId], [p].[VerifiedAt], [p].[VerifiedBy]
    FROM [Payments] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[SolarRequestId]
ORDER BY [t].[CreatedAt] DESC, [t].[Id], [u].[Id]

SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[AadharNumber], [t].[Address], [t].[AdminNotes], [t].[AlternateMobile], [t].[ApplicantName], [t].[ApprovalStatus], [t].[City], [t].[ConnectionType], [t].[CreatedAt], [t].[CreatedBy], [t].[CurrentStage], [t].[Email], [t].[ExternalProductId], [t].[IsDeleted], [t].[KVCapacity], [t].[LightBillNumber], [t].[LightBillOwnerType], [t].[LightBillPath], [t].[LightBillRelationName], [t].[LightBillRelationProofPath], [t].[MobileNumber], [t].[PANNumber], [t].[PinCode], [t].[PlanAmount], [t].[PmSuryaApplicationNo], [t].[PmSuryaLoanOption], [t].[RejectionReason], [t].[RequestNumber], [t].[RequestType], [t].[SelectedPlan], [t].[SolarProjectId], [t].[State], [t].[UpdatedAt], [t].[UpdatedBy], [t].[UserId], [u].[Id], [u].[AadharNumber], [u].[AccessFailedCount], [u].[Address], [u].[City], [u].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[EmailConfirmed], [u].[FatherName], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[LockoutEnabled], [u].[LockoutEnd], [u].[MobileNumber], [u].[NormalizedEmail], [u].[NormalizedUserName], [u].[PANNumber], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u].[PinCode], [u].[SecurityStamp], [u].[State], [u].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u].[UpdatedAt], [u].[UserName], [t0].[Id], [t0].[Amount], [t0].[CreatedAt], [t0].[CreatedBy], [t0].[IsDeleted], [t0].[IsVerified], [t0].[Notes], [t0].[PaymentDate], [t0].[PaymentMethod], [t0].[ReceiptImagePath], [t0].[ReceiptNumber], [t0].[ReferenceNumber], [t0].[SolarRequestId], [t0].[Status], [t0].[UTRNumber], [t0].[UpdatedAt], [t0].[UpdatedBy], [t0].[UserId], [t0].[VerifiedAt], [t0].[VerifiedBy]
FROM (
    SELECT [s].[Id], [s].[AadharNumber], [s].[Address], [s].[AdminNotes], [s].[AlternateMobile], [s].[ApplicantName], [s].[ApprovalStatus], [s].[City], [s].[ConnectionType], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[CreatedBy], [s].[CurrentStage], [s].[Email], [s].[ExternalProductId], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[KVCapacity], [s].[LightBillNumber], [s].[LightBillOwnerType], [s].[LightBillPath], [s].[LightBillRelationName], [s].[LightBillRelationProofPath], [s].[MobileNumber], [s].[PANNumber], [s].[PinCode], [s].[PlanAmount], [s].[PmSuryaApplicationNo], [s].[PmSuryaLoanOption], [s].[RejectionReason], [s].[RequestNumber], [s].[RequestType], [s].[SelectedPlan], [s].[SolarProjectId], [s].[State], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[UpdatedBy], [s].[UserId]
    FROM [SolarRequests] AS [s]
    WHERE [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [s].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [t].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Amount], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsVerified], [p].[Notes], [p].[PaymentDate], [p].[PaymentMethod], [p].[ReceiptImagePath], [p].[ReceiptNumber], [p].[ReferenceNumber], [p].[SolarRequestId], [p].[Status], [p].[UTRNumber], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[UserId], [p].[VerifiedAt], [p].[VerifiedBy]
    FROM [Payments] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[SolarRequestId]
ORDER BY [t].[CreatedAt] DESC, [t].[Id], [u].[Id]
